title: SAMSOC Board Meeting — February 2025
agenda:
1. SOE Portfolio Performance Report Q4 2024
2. Eskom Debt Relief Monitoring Framework
3. Denel Restructuring — Transaction Advisor Appointment
4. FY2025 Annual Budget Approval
5. Governance Compliance Review
minutes: Q4 2024 SOE portfolio performance report approved. Eskom debt relief monitoring framework endorsed. PricewaterhouseCoopers appointed as transaction advisors for Denel restructuring. FY2025 budget of R485 million approved.

resolutions.title: Approval of SOE Portfolio Performance Report Q4 2024
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the Q4 2024 SOE portfolio performance report.

resolutions.title: Appointment of Transaction Advisors — Denel Restructuring
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to appoint PricewaterhouseCoopers as transaction advisors for the Denel SOC Limited strategic equity partnership process.

title: SAMSOC Special Board Meeting — January 2025
agenda:
1. FY2025 Annual Budget Approval
2. Transnet Operational Recovery Plan Review
minutes: FY2025 annual budget of R485 million approved. Transnet operational recovery plan noted with concern — freight volumes below target.

resolutions.title: Approval of FY2025 Annual Budget
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2025 annual budget of R485 million.

title: SAMSOC Board Meeting — Scheduled May 2025
agenda:
1. Q1 FY2025 SOE Portfolio Performance
2. Eskom Debt Relief Q1 Milestone Review
3. SAA Strategic Partnership Update
4. Annual Report Approval
